TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Tjuruguai, title = Tjuruguai, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tjuruguai} }

S.FORM: Tjuruguai i Pingtung a kuwan nu Kalinku ku niyazu' nu Tjuruguai. u kasalumaluma' nu Tjuruguai sa, 104 ku luma'. kumud nu kasabinawlan sa, 319 ku tademawan. kasabinawlan nu Ingcumin sa, 297 ku tademaw, pakalatu 93%. u zuma sa, cay ku Ingcumin, 22 ku tademaw, pakalatu 7%. u kasabinacadan, Paiwan 89%, Bunun 1%, Amis 1%, Tayal 1%, zumazuma 2%.
S.PHON: tjuruguai i piŋtuŋ a kuwan nu kar~ɾinku ku nijazuʔ~ʡ nu tjuruguai. u kasar~ɾumar~ɾumaʔ~ʡ nu tjuruguai sa, *** ku r~ɾumaʔ~ʡ. kumud nu kasabinawr~ɾan sa, *** ku tadəmawan. kasabinawr~ɾan nu iŋʦumin sa, *** ku tadəmaw, pakar~ɾatu **%. u zuma sa, ʦaj ku iŋʦumin, ** ku tadəmaw, pakar~ɾatu *%. u kasabinaʦadan, paiwan **%, bunun *%, amis *%, tajar~ɾ *%, zumazuma *%.
S.FORM: Tjuruguai i Pingtung a kuwan nu Kalinku ku niyazu' nu Tjuruguai. u kasalumaluma' nu Tjuruguai sa, 104 ku luma'. kumud nu kasabinawlan sa, 319 ku tademawan. kasabinawlan nu Ingcumin sa, 297 ku tademaw, pakalatu 93%. u zuma sa, cay ku Ingcumin, 22 ku tademaw, pakalatu 7%. u kasabinacadan, Paiwan 89%, Bunun 1%, Amis 1%, Tayal 1%, zumazuma 2%.
S.PHON: tjuruguai i piŋtuŋ a kuwan nu kar~ɾinku ku nijazuʔ~ʡ nu tjuruguai. u kasar~ɾumar~ɾumaʔ~ʡ nu tjuruguai sa, *** ku r~ɾumaʔ~ʡ. kumud nu kasabinawr~ɾan sa, *** ku tadəmawan. kasabinawr~ɾan nu iŋʦumin sa, *** ku tadəmaw, pakar~ɾatu **%. u zuma sa, ʦaj ku iŋʦumin, ** ku tadəmaw, pakar~ɾatu *%. u kasabinaʦadan, paiwan **%, bunun *%, amis *%, tajar~ɾ *%, zumazuma *%.
